title: Alomia coelestina
taxonomy: Alomia coelestina belongs to the family Asteraceae and is classified within the tribe Senecioneae. It is a species of flowering plant native to Mexico. The plant is further classified into the genus Alomia, which comprises a small number of species. Alomia coelestina is closely related to other species within the genus, sharing similar characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Alomia coelestina is based on its unique morphological features and genetic makeup.
